displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: ZENXIN Organic Bananas are known to reduce swelling, protect against developing Type 2 diabetes, aid in weight loss, strengthen the nervous system and help with production of white blood cells - all due to the high level of vitamin B6 that bananas contain. Depending on your nutritional needs and preference, the best time to eat bananas change as generally, the taste and nutritional value change as they ripen. Newly-ripened bananas tend to be less sweet than well-ripened bananas because the starch hasn't fully broken down into simple sugars but you stay full for longer and enjoy the benefits of the resistant starch therein. On the other hand, a well-ripened banana with some dark patches on the skin is easier to digest and may give you the energy boost you require before playing sports.

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value: To prepare Good Nature Organic Bananas, simply peel back the skin for an easy, ready-to-eat snack. Slice bananas to add natural sweetness to cereals, smoothies, and yogurt bowls. For baking, mash them well to incorporate into recipes like banana bread or pancakes. You can also freeze sliced bananas to use as a creamy base for smoothies or homemade ice cream.

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Keep the Fruits at 5-7C, recommend to finish within 5 days

metaData.Key Information: Good Nature by Zenxin Organic Queen Apples bring a crisp, juicy bite with a balanced sweetness, ideal for fresh eating, baking, and salads. Certified organic by NASAA and processed in an ISO-certified facility, they provide high quality and environmental care in each apple. These apples are perfect for pies, smoothies, or as a fresh snack. Known for their satisfying crunch and vibrant red color, they bring both taste and appeal to any recipe.
metaData.Preparation: To prepare Organic Queen Apples, rinse well and slice as needed. Enjoy fresh for snacking, add to salads for a sweet crunch, or bake into desserts like pies and crumbles. Blend into smoothies for a refreshing sweetness. Store at room temperature to maintain their crisp texture and natural flavor.
metaData.Storage Information: Keep the Fruits at 5-7C, recommend to finish within 5 days

metaData.Key Information: Organic Fruit Box designed for people who are always on the go all day, with hectic days in the office or at school. It features a mixture of fresh and delicious fruit, ideal for preparing easy and healthy snacks or even a nutritious meal replacement/juice. As our Organic produce is seasonal, contents of the box will vary from week to week. All items are subjected to availability. You will receive a minimum of 5 items that may include: grapes, kiwi, blueberries, peach, avocado, lemon, orange, pear, apple, banana.

metaData.Key Information: ZENXIN Organic Kiwi offers a refreshing, tangy-sweet flavor, perfect for snacking, adding to fruit salads, or blending into smoothies. Certified organic by NASAA, these kiwis are grown without synthetic chemicals, making them a natural and eco-friendly choice. Carefully processed in an ISO-certified facility, they meet high standards of quality and safety. Enjoy the vibrant taste and unique texture of this premium organic kiwi in every bite.
metaData.Preparation: To prepare Organic Kiwi, rinse under cold water and slice in half for easy scooping with a spoon. Alternatively, peel the skin and slice for a colorful addition to fruit salads and desserts. Blend into smoothies for a tropical twist, or pair with other fruits for a refreshing snack. Keep chilled and use when ripe to enjoy its full, natural flavor.
metaData.Storage Information: Keep the fruits at 5-7C, recommend to finish within 3 days

metaData.Key Information: ZENXIN Organic Sweet Banana is a tropical fruit with easily digestible simple sugars and a high potassium content. This makes them an ideal snack for athletes and growing children. They are also a great source of soluble fibre, pyridoxine (B6) and polyphenol antioxidants.Ideal for smoothies! Perfect for freezing and using as you need.
metaData.Preparation: To prepare Organic Sweet Bananas, simply peel them for a ready-to-eat snack or slice them into cereals, smoothies, and desserts. Mash for use in baking recipes like banana bread or pancakes for a natural sweetness. You can also freeze sliced bananas for a creamy addition to smoothies or homemade ice creams. Store at room temperature and enjoy when ripe for the best flavor.
metaData.Storage Information: Keep the Fruits at 5-7C, recommend to finish within 5 days

product.description: Good Nature Organic Blueberries contain a wealth of nutrients such as vitamins C & K, minerals such as manganese and high soluble dietary fibre. Health benefits include antioxidants for improving the cognitive function and cardiovascular diseases, while the fibre helps with the reduction of cholesterol. They are great as a snack or even used in baking products.

metaData.Key Information:
- Certified Organic Produce
- Packed and Processed in Certified Organic Facilities
- Grown in Spain or Chile
metaData.Preparation: To prepare Organic Blueberries, simply rinse them gently and pat dry. Eat them raw to enjoy their full, natural flavor, or incorporate into desserts and sauces where their sweetness can be highlighted. Freeze for later use in smoothies, or bake into pastries for a burst of flavor. Their versatility makes them a delightful ingredient in both sweet and savory recipes.
metaData.Storage Information: Keep the Fruits at 5-7C, recommend to finish within 5 days

metaData.Key Information: ZENXIN Organic Coconut offers a rich, tropical flavor that’s perfect for baking, cooking, and smoothies. Certified organic by NASAA, this coconut is grown without synthetic chemicals, making it a natural and eco-friendly choice. Processed in an ISO-certified facility, it meets high standards for quality and safety from harvest to packaging. Enhance your recipes with the authentic taste of this premium organic coconut.
metaData.Preparation: To prepare Organic Coconut, start by cracking it open and draining the coconut water. Use a spoon to separate the white flesh from the shell, then grate, slice, or chop as desired. Add fresh coconut to desserts, curries, or blend into smoothies for a tropical twist. Store any unused portions in the refrigerator to maintain freshness.
metaData.Storage Information: Keep the Fruits at 5-7C, recommend to finish within 5 days

metaData.Key Information: ZENXIN Organic Granny Smith Apples bring a crisp, tart flavor perfect for baking, snacking, or adding freshness to salads. Certified organic by NASAA, these apples are grown without synthetic chemicals, providing a pure and eco-friendly choice. They are carefully handled in an ISO-certified processing facility, ensuring top quality and safety. Enjoy the vibrant taste and versatility of these premium organic apples.
metaData.Preparation: To prepare Organic Granny Smith Apples, rinse thoroughly under cold water to remove any surface impurities. Slice or chop as desired for salads, desserts, or snacking. For baking, remove the core and leave the skin on for added texture, or peel if a smoother finish is preferred. Enjoy them raw, baked, or cooked into sauces for a naturally tangy flavor.
metaData.Storage Information: Keep the Fruits at 5-7C, recommend to finish within 5 days

metaData.Key Information: ZENXIN Organic Oranges aren't just popular; they're practically celebrities in the citrus world! Packed with vitamin C, they're not only a health booster but also a snack-time superstar. You can sneak them into your meals or let them shine in a baked delight. With their nutritional prowess and zesty personality, these oranges are ready to be the life of your dietary party!
metaData.Preparation: To prepare Organic Oranges, start by rinsing the fruit under cold water and patting it dry. For easy snacking, peel the orange and separate it into segments. Slice the orange into rounds or wedges to add bright, citrus flavor to salads and desserts. You can also zest the peel for a burst of flavor in marinades, baked goods, and beverages.
metaData.Storage Information: Keep the Fruits at 5-7C, recommend to finish within 5 days

metaData.Key Information: ZENXIN's Organic Lemons are a versatile ingredient, perfect for adding a burst of freshness to your favorite dishes, drinks, and homemade remedies. Sourced from organic farms and certified by NASAA, these lemons are grown without synthetic chemicals, ensuring a natural and eco-friendly product. Processed in an ISO-certified facility, every step from farm to table adheres to the highest quality standards. Elevate your cooking and wellness routines with the purity and flavor of these organic lemons.
metaData.Preparation: To prepare Organic Lemons, rinse well and slice or zest as desired. Use fresh juice in sauces, marinades, or beverages for a citrusy punch, or add zest to enhance baked goods and desserts. Garnish dishes with lemon slices for a visually pleasing touch. Keep at room temperature to maximize juiciness.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in cool and dry place.

tags.name: Marketplace
tags.tagLine: You want it, we got it!

metaData.Key Information: ZENXIN Organic Avocados are creamy and versatile, perfect for salads, sandwiches, and smoothies, or simply enjoyed on their own. Certified organic by NASAA, these avocados are grown without synthetic chemicals, ensuring a natural and eco-friendly choice for your meals. They are carefully processed in an ISO-certified facility, meeting high standards for quality and safety. Add a touch of richness to your dishes with these premium organic avocados.
metaData.Preparation: Start by slicing it in half lengthwise and removing the pit. Scoop out the flesh with a spoon for easy slicing or dicing, depending on your dish. For a creamy addition to salads and sandwiches, gently mash the avocado with a fork. Enjoy it on toast, blend it into smoothies, or add it to dips like guacamole for a rich, smooth flavor.
metaData.Storage Information: Keep the fruits at 5-7°C, recommend to finish within 3 days
